variables.notes: Used rows outside the candidate list because the candidate list missed a more explicit SG&A row: 'Selling and Administration Expenses'. Per rule, because that explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty in the preview, included it and added overhead buckets 'Personnel costs' and 'Other external costs' for coverage. Manual review recommended to confirm there is no overlap/double counting between these labels across years. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Selling and Administration Expenses, [Income Statement] Other external costs

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list: use direct 'Interest Expense' when available; otherwise fall back to broader 'Financial Expenses' if the company only reports finance costs in some years.

candidates.why: Best available total equity line on the balance sheet.
Not equity; entire balance sheet total.

variables.notes: No separate parent-only equity line is shown. Using 'Total Equity'. To avoid double counting, MIB is set to empty.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: This is an income statement subtotal, not a balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interests line.

variables.notes: No balance sheet non-controlling interest / minority interest line is visible. Since BE uses total equity, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
